# 反向证据样本：AI 客服质检

- 2026-06-15 Reddit smallbusiness: The helpdesk already has a built-in QA dashboard, and for our small team the free tier is enough.

- 2026-06-14 知乎评论：我们确实想看客服质检，但没有预算，表格够用，老板不会为这个再买一个订阅。

- 2026-06-12 Product Hunt review: Privacy is the blocker. We cannot upload customer chats to another vendor without compliance review.

- 2026-06-10 V2EX：之前试过类似工具，配置太麻烦，太复杂，最后还是回到手动抽查。
